Defendants Jashvant Patel And Hansaben Patel'S Motion To Consolidate Case No Gcg-14-541163 And Cgc-15-545465
Off Calendar Oct-13-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants Jashvant Patel And Hansaben Patel's Motion To Consolidate Case No GGC-14-541163 and CGC-15-545465 is taken off calendar for this line. This motion is being heard on line 6 of today's calendar in case number 541163. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Case No Gcg 14541163 And Cgc 15545465
Off Calendar Aug-26-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANTS JASHVANT PATEL and HANSABEN PATEL's Motion To Consolidate Case No GCG-14-541163 And CGC-15-545465 is transferred to Department 302 to be heard on October 13, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. per the Order of the Presiding Judge. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
